name: Conga Billing
description: Subscription billing and invoicing platform built on Salesforce from Congas revenue lifecycle management suite.

seo.title: Conga Billing — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Conga Billing: Subscription billing and invoicing platform built on Salesforce from Congas revenue lifecycle management suite.

when_to_use: Subscription billing and invoicing for Salesforce-native revenue teams
CPQ-to-billing automation within Salesforce for SaaS contract management
Revenue recognition and billing automation inside Salesforce ecosystem
Enterprise subscription management for orgs already on Salesforce CRM

pros: Handles complex enterprise revenue lifecycle logic
Strong contract and renewal management features
Supports hybrid subscription and one-time billing
cons: Implementation is long, costly, and consultant-heavy
Not developer-friendly for modern SaaS stacks
Overkill for anything below large enterprise
review.verdict: Enterprise-grade Salesforce-native billing that delivers depth at the cost of flexibility, speed, and budget.
review.best_for: Large enterprises standardized on Salesforce running complex quote-to-cash processes.
review.not_for: Startups, PLG SaaS, or any team not already deeply invested in Salesforce.
